items.title: S. Janaki’s fresh voice, improvisation made Kerala groove to her tunes
items.summary: Janaki inimitably lent her voice to numerous evergreen Malayalam film songs from the 1960s to the 1990s. Songs such as Manjanikombil, Thenum Vayambum, Nadha Nee varum, Manassilu...

items.title: Beauty spot river is 'dying', worried pupils say
items.summary: Children from a school near a popular beauty spot test local water quality over pollution concerns.
